scripts.dev:parallel: concurrently -n emulators,functions,frontend -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run emulators" "npm -w functions run build:watch" "npm -w frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:prebuild: npm -w functions run build && npm run dev:parallel
scripts.build: npm -w functions run build && npm -w frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm -w functions run lint && npm -w frontend run lint
